case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BJERK, JOEL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-02-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-06-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BJERK, JOEL $2,311.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,337.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BJERK, JOEL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,311.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BJERK, JOEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
